Game.Name: Super Mahjong 3 - Karakuchi (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Super Mahjong 3: Karakuchi is a mahjong game for the Super Famicom. It follows Super Mahjong and Super Mahjong 2 and offers a similar mahjong experience to its forebears. The player is able to create their own avatar, including portrait and age, and play against various CPU opponents in four-player games.
Game.Notes: Super Mahjong 3: Karakuchi is a mahjong game for the Super Famicom. It follows Super Mahjong and Super Mahjong 2 and offers a similar mahjong experience to its forebears. The player is able to create their own avatar, including portrait and age, and play against various CPU opponents in four-player games.
